name: Anniversary
comment:
Perform basic anniversary calculations

@docs getYears, isDay, getNext, getLast

values.name: getLast
values.comment: Returns a DayMonthYear record for anniversary's last occurrence

values.name: getNext
values.comment: Returns a DayMonthYear record for anniversary's next occurrence

values.name: getYears
values.comment: Calculates the number of anniversary years passed

values.name: isDay
values.comment: Returns a Bool on whether or not the provided Time.Zone / Time.Posix occurs on the anniversary
